title: Plugins
description: Every plugin runs in its own sandbox and can do exactly what you allow it to, and nothing more.
denied: You do not have permission to view plugins.
emptyDescription: The catalogue is empty, or it could not be reached.

card.grantedUnknown: The API did not return the granted permissions. Open “Change permissions” to review and grant them again.
card.requests: Asks for {count} permissions. You will review and approve each one before it is installed.
card.requestsNone: This plugin asks for no permissions.
card.failed: The last activation failed: the plugin's setup() threw. Check its configuration and try again.
card.activateFailedTitle: Could not activate — the plugin's setup() threw
card.installDenied: You do not have permission to install plugins.
card.settingsGenerated: This form is generated from the plugin's settingsSchema.

settings.denied: You do not have permission to configure plugins.

consent.subtitle: Published by {publisher}. Read what this plugin asks for before you agree.
consent.requestsHint: Uncheck anything you do not want to grant. The plugin still installs, but the features that depend on that permission may stop working or report an error.
consent.requestsNone: This plugin asks for no permissions. It can only act inside the sandbox.
consent.deniedHint: The sandbox (a V8 isolate) blocks the following, no matter which permissions you grant above.
consent.summaryNone: No permissions granted. The plugin will be installed, but it will almost certainly not be able to do anything.
consent.summarySensitive: {count} of them are sensitive — only grant them if you trust the publisher {publisher}.
consent.networkHint: These hosts come from the plugin's manifest and are the only ones it can ever reach. Granting the permission above grants exactly this list — nothing wider.

actions.installedWithoutPermissions: Plugin installed with no permissions granted.
actions.installDenied: You do not have permission to install plugins.
actions.activateDenied: You do not have permission to turn plugins on or off.
actions.setupFailed: The plugin's setup() threw while starting up.
actions.deactivateFailed: Could not turn the plugin off.
actions.configureDenied: You do not have permission to configure plugins.

sandbox.filesystem: Read or write files on the host
sandbox.network: Open a socket, or reach any host it did not declare
sandbox.crossTenant: Reach another site's or another customer's data

permissions.unknown: This version does not know this permission. Check it carefully before granting it.

site:read.label: See the website's details
site:read.detail: The name, the domains and the basic details of the site.

site:create.label: Create new websites
site:create.detail: Create a site and claim a hostname for it. A hostname is unique across the whole platform: once taken, nobody else can use it.

site:update.label: Change the website's details
site:update.detail: Edit the site's name, domains and default language.

site:delete.label: Delete the website
site:delete.detail: Delete the whole site. This cannot be undone.

content:read.label: Read the website's content
content:read.detail: See every post, page and draft.

content:create.label: Create new content
content:create.detail: Add new posts or pages to the site.

content:update.label: Edit content
content:update.detail: Change existing content, including content written by other people.

content:delete.label: Delete content
content:delete.detail: Remove posts or pages from the site.

content:publish.label: Publish content
content:publish.detail: Make content public without anyone reviewing it.

content-type:read.label: See the structure of content types
content-type:read.detail: Read the field definitions of posts, pages and the rest.

content-type:manage.label: Change the structure of content types
content-type:manage.detail: Add, edit or remove fields — this can affect content that already exists.

media:read.label: See the media library
media:read.detail: Browse the images and files that have been uploaded.

media:upload.label: Upload media files
media:upload.detail: Add new images and files to the site's library.

media:delete.label: Delete media files
media:delete.detail: Remove images or files from the library, including ones that are in use.

menu:read.label: See the navigation menus
menu:read.detail: Read the structure of the site's menus.

menu:manage.label: Edit the navigation menus
menu:manage.detail: Add, edit and reorder menu entries.

theme:read.label: See the theme in use
theme:read.detail: Read the theme's details and its settings.

theme:install.label: Install themes
theme:install.detail: Add a new theme to the site.

theme:activate.label: Change the theme in use
theme:activate.detail: Activate a different theme — this changes how the whole site looks.

theme:configure.label: Change the theme's settings
theme:configure.detail: Edit the theme's colours, layout and other options.

plugin:read.label: See the list of plugins
plugin:read.detail: Know which plugins are installed on the site.

plugin:install.label: Install other plugins
plugin:install.detail: This plugin can install further plugins and grant them permissions.

plugin:activate.label: Turn other plugins on and off
plugin:activate.detail: Activate or disable the plugins already on the site.

plugin:configure.label: Change other plugins' settings
plugin:configure.detail: Edit the settings of the other plugins on the site.

user:read.label: See user details
user:read.detail: Read the name, email address and role of every member of the site.

user:invite.label: Invite new users
user:invite.detail: Send an invitation to join the site to any email address.

user:manage.label: Manage users
user:manage.detail: Change a member's role, or remove them from the site.

settings:update.label: Change the website's settings
settings:update.detail: Edit the general settings — this can affect the whole site.

mail:send.label: Send email as this site
mail:send.detail: The plugin can send email through your mail server, from your address. It cannot read your inbox, change the sender, or see the SMTP password — but the mail carries your domain's name and reputation. Grant it only to plugins you expect to email people.

network:fetch.label: Reach the services it named
network:fetch.detail: The plugin can make requests to the specific hosts listed below, and to nothing else. It never opens the connection itself — the server does, on its behalf, and refuses any address inside your own network. Anything you type into a password field of its settings is spent on those hosts without the plugin ever being able to read it.

audit:read.label: Read the activity log
audit:read.detail: See the history of what every member has done on the site.

package:review.label: Review quarantined packages
package:review.detail: Approve or reject a theme or plugin the malware scanner flagged — deciding that distrusted code may run.

theme:sideload.label: Install themes from a file
theme:sideload.detail: Add theme code that no marketplace reviewed — and a theme runs unsandboxed.

plugin:sideload.label: Install plugins from a file
plugin:sideload.detail: Add plugin code that no marketplace reviewed. It still runs in the sandbox.

sideloadHint: Plugins you installed from a file. They run in the sandbox like any other, once approved.
sideloadApprovedHint: Approved. Install it onto a site from the catalogue above to grant it permissions.
